description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels. The exterior is dominated by dark panels and expansive blue-tinted glass, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. On one side, a prominent outdoor staircase leads from the ground to a rooftop terrace, which is bordered by a light blue parapet. The house is set into a sloped green terrain, with the slope integrated into the building's structure and providing access to the lower level. The front facade is symmetrical, with two sets of large windows flanking a recessed central entryway. The overall look is minimalist, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large blue-tinted windows, and a sleek, boxy design set into a sloped green terrain. Features include a rooftop terrace, outdoor staircase, and a symmetrical glass facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade with large blue-tinted windows and a recessed central entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor staircase and the integration of the house into the sloped green terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, parapet, and the full extent of the green slope along the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the sloped terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entryway with steps, flanked by large glass panels and minimal decorative elements
